mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD B WHERE B.STATUS = 'Y'
AND B.CATEGORY_NO = #{categoryNo}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT BOARD.*, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM ( SELECT B.BOARD_NO AS boardNo , BC.CATEGORY_NO AS categoryNo , B.TITLE AS title , M.NICK_NAME AS nickName , B.CREATED_AT AS createdAt , COUNT(BR.REPLY_NO) AS replyCount
FROM BOARD B JOIN MEMBER M ON (M.MEMBER_NO = B.MEMBER_NO) LEFT JOIN BOARD_CATEGORY BC ON (BC.CATEGORY_NO = B.CATEGORY_NO) LEFT JOIN BOARD_REPLY BR ON (BR.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO) AND BR.STATUS = 'Y'
WHERE B.STATUS = 'Y'
AND B.CATEGORY_NO = #{categoryNo}
GROUP BY B.BOARD_NO, M.MEMBER_NO, BC.CATEGORY_NO, B.TITLE , M.NICK_NAME, B.CREATED_AT ORDER BY B.CREATED_AT DESC, B.BOARD_NO DESC ) BOARD WHERE ROWNUM <= #{pageQuery.endRow} ) WHERE RNUM >= #{pageQuery.startRow} ORDER BY RNUM ASC

SELECT B.BOARD_NO , B.TITLE , B.CONTENT , B.CATEGORY_NO , B.MEMBER_NO
FROM BOARD B
